calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Leo LaROcca, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Jeffrey Katz, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: CVOLS, LLC, a California limited liability company; Daniel L. Chartraw and Dean A. VonFeldt as follows:
Damages $50,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,342.60
Costs $611.45, for a total of $51,954.05
Judgement signed in open court.
